text: A boat being rowed down the river between two buildings
Small dark bear standing up on rocks outside
A wood heated grill with a bun and hotdog on aluminum foil.
Group of young men skate boarding around a bust.
There are several airplane in the air and they are leaving a trail.
A man and a dog standing in front of a house.
The young girl is eating a hot dog while riding in a shopping cart.
A clock next to a statue and bells on a building.
An older male is standing in the room of a house with what appears to be a Wii controller in his hand.
A person riding a skateboard up a ramp by a mountain.
